# dataframe_to_victoriametrics

## Purpose

Bulk-ingest a Pandas DataFrame as VictoriaMetrics time-series via the Prometheus text-format import endpoint. Auto-detects label vs value columns or accepts an explicit list.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_name` | `str` | Output Dagster asset name. |
| `upstream_asset_key` | `str` | Upstream asset providing the DataFrame. |
| `metric_name` | `str` | Prometheus metric name (e.g. 'orders_throughput'). |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `base_url_env_var` | `str` | `"VM_BASE_URL"` | Env var with VictoriaMetrics base URL. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"victoriametrics"` | Dagster asset group name. |
| `description` | `str` | — | — |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | — | — |
| `tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | — | — |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | — | — |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `timestamp_column` | `str` | `"timestamp"` | Column with datetime timestamps. |
| `value_column` | `str` | `"value"` | Column with numeric metric values. |
| `label_columns` | `List[str]` | — | Explicit column list to use as labels. If unset, every column other than timestamp_column + value_column becomes a label. |
| `bearer_token_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with bearer token. |
| `request_timeout_seconds` | `int` | `60` | — |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.DataframeToVictoriaMetricsComponent
attributes:
  asset_name: vm_orders_throughput
  upstream_asset_key: orders_throughput_per_region
  metric_name: orders_throughput
  base_url_env_var: VM_BASE_URL
  timestamp_column: ts
  value_column: throughput
```

## Validation level

**code** — see the matching `vendors/<name>.md` page for live demo status.
